prs.title: Unify timer enum
Increase crash report stack trace buffer from 10 to 20 frames
fix(pnpm migration): fix `"lockfileVersion"` number parsing
fix(install): make negative workspace patterns work
Add `jsc.DecodedJSValue`; make `jsc.Strong` more efficient
fix(Bun.SQL) fix command detection on sqlite
bun test dots reporter
Refactor: Split JSNodeHTTPServerSocket into separate files
fix(crypto): hkdf callback should pass null (not undefined) on success
Add new bindings generator; port `SSLConfig`
Add `.cloneUpgrade()` to fix clone-upgrade
Fix Windows crash in process.title when console title is empty
fix(install): isolated install with `file` dependency resolving to root package
Use cached structure in JSBunRequest::clone
bun:test performance regression fix
Rereun-each fix
fix(Bun.SQL) time should be represented as a string and date as a time
fix(Bun.RedisClient) keep it alive when connecting
Add 'bun why' to help menu
fix(node:http) fix closing socket after upgraded to websocket
Passthrough anyerror when using handleOom
Upgrade WebKit
`bun feedback`
Enable `--useExplicitResourceManagement` by default
Allow multiple inline snapshots in one call if they are the same
fix(SQL) implement unix socket support
run beforeAll before the first file and afterAll after the last file
Re-enable afterAll inside a test
test: break up node-http.test.ts
fix: Ordering Semantics
Fix `memory.deinit`; handle more types
Faster linux zig build
fix(Bun.SQL) fix IN, UPDATE support in helpers, and fix JSONB/JSON serialization
fix(redis) refactor valkey connection status and lifecycle handling
Fix --tolerate-republish flag in bun publish (continues PR #22107)
ssg 3
fix(lint): resolve no-unused-expressions errors
docs: add zstd compression documentation for v1.2.14
docs: add missing v1.2.20 features documentation
docs: add v1.2.17 features to documentation
docs: add missing v1.2.16 feature documentation
docs: update for Bun v1.2.15 features
docs: add v1.2.18 features documentation
fix(test): update error message assertion for git clone failure
fix(pnpm migration): correctly resolve `link:` dependencies on the root package
docs: Add documentation for Bun v1.2.23 features
docs: add missing v1.2.19 features to documentation
docs: add missing v1.2.21 features to documentation
docs: add missing v1.2.13 features to documentation
docs: add v1.2.22 features to documentation
Fix crash in `toContainAnyKeys` and `toContainKeys` with non-object values
safety: a few more exception validation fixes
fix(parser): TSX arrow function bugfix
fix(parser): scope mismatch bug from `parseSuffix`
fix(parser): possible crash with --minify-syntax and string -> dot conversions
feat: Implement `using` keyword (explicit resource management)
fix(glob): fix index out of bounds in GlobWalker
vscode: remove old test runner codelens stuff
Introduce ahead of time bundling for HTML imports with `bun build`
implement pnpm migration
Fix V8StackTraceIterator to handle frames without parentheses
feat(sql.array) add support to sql.array
Handle optionals in `bun.memory.deinit`
revert this change made to ShellRmTask.DirTask
hotfix(redis): Automatically connect on .subscribe()
fix(build): Promise.all() async module dependencies
`bun.ptr.Shared`: fix dependency loop and add leak/adopt methods
node:http2: fix leak in H2FrameParser
Fix fetch-preconnect test failure
fix(valkey/redis) fix tls (includes pub/sub)
fix lint
Make `bun.webcore.Blob` smaller and ref-counted
Concurrent limit `--max-concurrency`, defaults to 20
Add generic-allocator `ArrayList`
Add `ExternalShared` and `RawRefCount`
Require deinit function for memory.deinit()
Redis PUB/SUB
Fix server stability issue with oversized requests
fix(fetch): print request body for application/x-www-form-urlencoded in curl logs
Fix double-free in createArgv function
Move Bun__JSRequest__calculateEstimatedByteSize earlier
Add --randomize --seed flag
Fix vm destruction assertion failure in udp socket, reduce usage of protect()
Remove stale path assertion on Windows
feat(windows): implement authenticode stripping for --compile
node:tty: use terminal VT mode on Windows
Fix bun_dependency_versions.h regenerating on every CMake run
ci: ensure tests that require docker have it available
fix(build): Minor Linux Build Fixes
chore(build): Add build:debug:noasan and remove build:debug:asan
Fix aborting fetch() calls while the socket is connecting. Fix a thread-safety issue involving redirects and AbortSignal.
node:crypto: add blake2s256 hasher
feat(test): add --randomize flag to run tests in random order
Synchronous concurrent test fix
Fix double slash in error stack traces when root_path has trailing slash
Implement NODE_USE_SYSTEM_CA with --use-system-ca CLI flag
chore(libuv): Update to 1.51.0
Fix dns.resolve callback parameters to match Node.js behavior
Improve --reporter flag help and error messages
Fix panic when macros return collections with 3+ arrays/objects
Fix YAML.parse to throw SyntaxError instead of BuildMessage
Prevent test.only and snapshot updates in CI
Update install.sh to try ~/.bash_profile first for PATH modification
package.json: add shorthands for creating remote machines
update no-validate-exceptions.txt
fix(install): serialize updated workspaces versions correctly for `bun.lockb`
lsan: fix reporting on linux ci
feat: add concurrent-test-glob option to bunfig.toml for selective concurrent test execution
node:net: fix handle leak
feat: add test.serial() API for forcing serial test execution
Make sure bun can be installed on Alpine Linux (musl) on arm64 hardware
fix(Bun.sql) handle numeric correctly
fix(benchmark): postgres benchmark was not performing any queries under deno and node
docs: Add missing YAML.stringify() documentation
bun.ptr.Shared.Lazy fixes cppbind change
fix(node:http) allow CONNECT in node http/https servers
ci: increase asan to 2xlarge
Fix infinite recursion when error.stack is a circular reference
bun test - don't send start events for skipped tests
fix(install): change semver core numbers to u64
fix(test): add EXPECTED_COLOR and RECEIVED_COLOR aliases
Remove remnants of '--only' flag in documentation
Start using test.concurrent in our tests
feat: add --cpu and --os flags to bun install for filtering optional dependencies
vscode extention - don't require start " " in test name pattern
Fix spurious LSAN errors
refactor: move jsxSideEffects from tsconfig to jsx build config
feat: Implement process.report.getReport() on Windows
Rewrite test/describe, add test.concurrent
Make the error better when you do `console.log(\"`
Refactor `Bun__canonicalizeIP`
shrink bun error modal by 250 KB
fix(bundler): minify `Array` constructor with ternary regression
Migrate all Docker usage to unified docker-compose infrastructure
Speculative fix for intermittent ETXTBUSY when installing binlinks
